invariant: list_open_loops and commitment extraction surface transcript-vs-email commitment conflicts with caution rather than rendering an unqualified commitment.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = the transcript commitment is rendered only with use_with_caution and the email conflict is attached as an unresolved contradiction.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Seeds two contested commitment claims and one contradiction edge.
fixture_design_notes.provider_replay: Pins extracted commitments from both transcript and email sources.
fixture_design_notes.external_replay: Includes synthetic source summaries without real customer data.
fixture_design_notes.expected_output: The open loop is contested and paired with an explicit conflict object.
fixture_design_notes.expected_provenance: Both sources are attributed and the conflict is visible.
